items.title: Agemem Main Results

meta.experiment_or_case: Main results across 5 long-horizon benchmarks (ALFWorld, SciWorld, PDDL, BabyAI, HotpotQA) on Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-4B
meta.metric: average task score (%), memory-quality MQ, active-context tokens
meta.limitations: No per-benchmark variance reported in fetched text; absolute compute cost not given.

items.body:
## Evidence

Numbers extracted verbatim from the v2 tables/figures. See [[content/agemem]] and [[claims/agemem-unified-beats-modular]].

items.title: Memoryagentbench Results

meta.experiment_or_case: 记忆四维(AR/TTL/LRU/CR)横向压测:长上下文 / RAG / 结构增强 RAG / 商用记忆 agent
meta.dataset: RULER-QA / NIAH-MQ / ∞-Bench-QA / EventQA / 分类×5 / Movie Recom / ∞-Bench-Sum / FactConsolidation
meta.baseline: GPT-4o/4.1-mini, Gemini-2.0-Flash, Claude-3.7; BM25/Contriever/NV-Embed-v2; RAPTOR/GraphRAG/HippoRAG-v2/Mem0/Cognee; Self-RAG/MemGPT
meta.metric: SubEM / Recall / ROUGE-F1 / Accuracy / Recall@5 / model-based F1
meta.result: AR: NV-Embed RULER-QA 83.0%, BM25 NIAH 100%, GPT-4.1-mini EventQA 82.6%。TTL: GPT-4o 87.6% vs Mem0 3.4%。LRU: Claude-3.7 52.5% vs RAG/agentic 0.4–20.7%。CR: 单跳 GPT-4o 60.0%,多跳全体 ≤6%(o4-mini@32K 14.0%)。
meta.limitations: 数据集主要为合成(作者自承);开放题用 GPT-4o judge;硬件成本未给。

items.body:

items.title: Qwen3 Coder Next Results

meta.experiment_or_case: coding/agentic 基准横向对比(80A3 vs 开源大模型与前沿闭源)
meta.result: SWE-Bench Verified 70.6–71.3%(三 scaffold);Multilingual 62.8%;Pro 56.2%;EvalPlus 86.56%;MultiPL-E 88.23%;CRUXEval 95.88%;LiveCodeBench v6 58.93%;Codeforces 2100;Terminal-Bench 2.0 34.2–36.2%。对照 Claude-Opus-4.5 78.2%。
meta.limitations: 作者侧复现(已做去泄漏+统一 scaffold);训练数据/算力未公开。

items.body:
## Evidence

数字逐项摘自 v1 正文表格;§5.1 记录了 baseline 公平性做法(同 scaffold 复现、去 commit 泄漏、统一 turn 上限)。See [[content/qwen3-coder-next]] 与 [[claims/qwen3-coder-next-training-over-size]]。
items.excerpt: 数字逐项摘自 v1 正文表格;§5.1 记录了 baseline 公平性做法(同 scaffold 复现、去 commit 泄漏、统一 turn 上限)。See [[content/qwen3-coder-next]] 与 [[claims/qwen3-coder-next-training-over-size]]。
